description: The ? operator at feed.rs:264 couples the success path of the new editing_session_state_changed emit to the pre-existing feed_state_changed emit. If editing_session_state_changed emit fails (e.g., serialization or IPC channel error), the function returns Err and feed_state_changed is never emitted — the feed UI receives no update. Before Sprint 3, feed_state_changed was always emitted on the success path. The spec (REQ-FEED-024) says select_past_note 'SHALL ALSO emit' but is silent on error handling. A more defensive approach would log the editing_session_state_changed error and unconditionally emit feed_state_changed, or document the all-or-nothing semantics explicitly in the spec.
